expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: result.md states the contract requires relevant historical analogs to be rendered as explicit “[ANALOG-GATE]” required-before-ship items in the Phase 5b release recommendation, but also states: “The benchmark evidence does not include any Phase 5b artifacts showing these required gates.” It further notes missing required Phase 5b outputs (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b) and therefore cannot demonstrate analog-gate enforcement.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md and result.md both report missing Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts required by the phase5b rubric: “Missing context/checkpoint_audit_BCIN-7289.md”, “Missing context/checkpoint_delta_BCIN-7289.md”, and “Missing drafts/qa_plan_phase5b_r<round>.md”. The benchmark verdict is “FAIL (blocking)” because Phase 5b alignment cannot be verified without these outputs.
